docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-24-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-24-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE GREG ARKUS, PRESIDENT/OWNER OF GREG'S INC., DBA PETE'S INC., AND DEFENDANT MICHAEL MITRANI. ON 7/28/16, DEFENDANT SUBPOEAED DOCUMENTS FROM THE CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF CONSUMER AFFAIRS, BUREAU OF AUTOMITIVE REPAIR. DOCUMENTS WERE PURPORTEDLY SENT TO THE COURT VIA OVERNIGHT EXPRESS COURIER ON 8/15/16. DOCUMENTS WERE NEVER RECEIVED BY THE COURT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GREG'S, INC. DBA PETE'S  INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MITRANI, MICHAEL $2,034.71 PRINCIPAL, $97.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,132.21 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
